description: Terry cloth tan puppy plush — sewing and fabric repair.
itemDetails:
A terry cloth tan puppy plush belongs to softer baby-safe plush categories where looped or towel-like textures are used for tactile comfort. This style has been common in infant and toddler gift lines since at least the 1990s.

Construction typically uses cotton/poly terry or terry-like polyester fabric with soft fill and embroidered features.

googleReview.quote: Took my girlfriends 20 year old teddy to be fixed very last minute and i was able to be fit in so quickly. my girlfriends teddy was ready the next day and looked identical to how he was years ago. couldn't recommend them any higher — thank you guys
